content.en:
The eighth dimensional will mastery of the Wumu Sword Mang is very powerful, and there is still the potential to continue to improve, if it is cultivated to the extreme, it is the real great terror.

However, it will take a long time to continue to improve the Ebony Mother's sword.

"With the Soul Will Peerless of the Eighth Dimension, even if the Soul Will has reached the fourth realm of the Ninth Dimension, as long as the other party does not comprehend the Eighth Dimension Will Peerlessness, the Soul Will will be severely damaged by my Dark Mother Sword!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And in the fourth realm, it is absolutely extremely rare to be able to create one's own soul will mastery, after all, it is even more difficult to create one's own soul will mastery than one's own multi-dimensional mastery, and even many fourth realms don't know that there is such a thing as a will masterpiece.

Now, Ye Tian, who created his own Eighth Dimension Will Peerless Learning, is a bit of an invincible trend in the Fourth Realm.

After creating the Wumu sword, Ye Tian came to an innate multi-dimensional sword killing array, the sword here is even more terrifying, but if he can withstand the sword here, he can use the sword here to refine his soul will.

And what Ye Tian entered was the weakest innate multi-dimensional sword killing array, and with his strength, he could barely withstand it.

Subsequently.

He used the sword mang's will method to refine his soul will, and with the eighth dimensional will of the black mother sword mang, he would not be crushed by the sword mang's soul ~ will.

Pain!

Endless pain!

But Ye Tian still insisted on enduring it, after all, using this way to refine the soul will was much faster than refining it slowly.

He wants to refine his soul will to the ninth dimension, and even if he can't do it here, he can save countless hours!

"It's time to go, leave one copy body to cultivate here, and let the other copy body go to the more than four thousand realms!"

Wow!

Ye Tian shuttled through the corridor of the sword, avoiding those innate multi-dimensional sword killing arrays, and then came to the last distance, the sword rays at this distance were very terrifying, even he had to rush out in the shortest possible time, otherwise he would still be hit hard.

"Broken!"

Ye Tianshi unleashed the Four Realms Multi-Dimensional Peerless Sand and Gravel Robbery Light, turned into a sand and gravel Robbery Light, and instantly broke through the endless sword light curtain, broke away, and left the Sword Corridor.

......

Opposite the Corridor of Swords is Territory 4997.

When Ye Tian entered here, the pressure around him was majestic, and the suppression of heaven and earth here far exceeded the territory of the Five Thousand Numbers.

However, he quickly adapted to this place, but the combat damage will be much smaller here.

After all, the suppression power of the Death Void here is more than ten times greater, the Death Void is more stable, and it is not easy to smash the Death Void, at least the strength of the Fourth Realm is needed to make the Death Void crack.

Moreover, the speed will also be reduced a lot.

In the 5,000th Territory, a group of Fourth Realms can easily smash an extradimensional territory, and in the 6,000th Territory, some Third Realms can smash an extradimensional territory.

But here, no amount of the Fourth Realm can destroy a Hyperdimensional Territory, I'm afraid that only the Fifth Realm can destroy a Extradimensional Territory!

For the territory of four thousand nine hundred and ninety-seven, Ye Tian also had a little understanding from the Qinya Realm Lord.

This extradimensional realm is indeed a little stronger than the five thousand realm, but it is very limited, there are only a dozen fourth realms here, but the third realm is a lot.

And there are a total of 200,000 extra-dimensional realms here, and each extra-dimensional realm can give birth to hundreds or even thousands of third realms, so you can imagine how many third realms there are.

Only by becoming the fourth realm can you barely have some status here.

If you reach the 4,000th Realm, then the Fourth Realm is also as many as dogs, only those who can be called invincible in the Fourth Realm have a great reputation, and the ordinary Fourth Realm has no status, so it is not worth mentioning.

On the side of the more than 4,000 realms, only the forces that exist in the fifth realm can be regarded as overlord-level extradimensional forces.

And there are a lot of overlord-level extradimensional forces here, there are about hundreds, each of them has more than one fifth realm, and there are also some scattered cultivators in the fifth realm, and their whereabouts are uncertain.

"The strength of the territory of four thousand nine hundred and ninety-seven is not strong, and there is no great inheritance and opportunity here, so let's leave!"

Ye Tian disguised his identity, and only then did he come from here, and also to prevent others from knowing that he came out of the corridor of the sword.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian followed some chambers of commerce in the 4997 Territory to leave this extradimensional territory on a treasure ship and headed to the next destination, the 4,500 Extradimensional Territory.

The 4,500 extra-dimensional territory is also very prosperous, although it is not as good as the 4,000 territory, but this extra-dimensional territory is very large, and there are many treasures, and there is also a hegemon-level extradimensional force sitting in the town.

This overlord-level extradimensional force is the Great Thousand Feather Gate, this extradimensional force has a good reputation, has many industries under its command, does a lot of business, and has also turned the territory of 4,500 into a trading territory, and has also attracted many outsiders to settle here for a long time.

Ye Tian was ready to use this territory as a territory for his next long-term settlement.

And he is only a cultivator in the middle of the fourth realm, this cultivation is really inconspicuous here, and he has not come from the gate of the Four Elephant Realm, and he will not be targeted, at most he thinks that he is a scattered cultivation of the fourth realm.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the 4,500 Extradimensional Territory, and then disposed of some of the treasures on his body and exchanged them for a currency here-Duowei Treasure Coins.

The purchasing power of Multi-Dimensional Treasure Coins is very strong, and it is suitable for use in the Fourth Realm.

Ye Tian exchanged for some multi-dimensional treasure coins, and bought a mansion, which contained a lot of space and powerful formations, which was suitable for him to settle down and would not be disturbed by the outside world.

In the years that followed, he occasionally inquired about the news here.

Ye Tian found that even here, the Willless Peerless Sect was still unavailable, and even the fragments were not easy to buy.

And the fifth realm here is also very rare, and it will not appear easily, and the ordinary fourth realm will not see those fifth realms at all.

Moreover, those Fifth Realms all used endless years to break through successfully, and it was too difficult to become the Fifth Realm, even those overlord-level extradimensional forces were difficult to cultivate the Fifth Realm.

On the side of the more than 4,000 realms, the fifth realm that broke through recently was still broken through during the last multidimensional tribulation.

The multi-dimensional catastrophe was only known when Ye Tian came here, and he hadn't heard of it before.
